Package index

All functions

button()
buttons with status
css_add()
Add custom css
css_body()
Body css
css_hide_errors()
Hide error css
css_leaflet_full()
Leaflet full screen
css_navbar()
Navbar css
css_slider()
Slider css
dev_prep()
Prepare package to run app during development
fix_text()
text for signalling something should be fixed
help_size()
help tag and font size
info()
Info text appear when icon clicked
inline()
Add inline css
label_size()
label tag and font size
p_size()
p tag and font size
poisson_citation()
Poisson package citation
poisson_footer()
Poisson footer
poisson_header()
Poisson header
run_app()
Run the Shiny Application
select_input_x()
Select input with x
slack_bot()
Pretty slack bot message
value_box()

Developed by Sebastian Dalgarno.
